title: PLASTIC STEP STOOL NON ANTI SLIP TOILET POTTY TRAINING KIDS CHILDREN KITCHEN
features: SAFETY - Durable and tough, this step ladder features rubber grips as well as an anti skid footpad providing grip when using the step ladder
PERFECT FOR KIDS - Ideal for washing hands, or brushing your teeth, can also be used in bedrooms as well as kitchen and living rooms.
ANTI-SLIP - The surface is made of TPE anti-slip layer particles, thick and thick, protect the small ankles, the bottom anti-slip mat is strong, do not worry about slipping.
CARRY HOLES - It also features integrated carry holes for easy transportation or moving around, lightweight enough for your child to move around.
description: This toilet step is a valuable help for all elderly people and those with mobility problems. The foot step stool reduces the height of step ups to toilets, bath and showers allowing entering and usage easier without much effort. The non slip step stool offers a large support base, allowing both feet to be placed before the next step. The portable step stool surface is made of non-slip material to ensure the safety of your loved ones. The platform step up is also a great help to get up and down the bed: once tried, your loved one will not want to do without it anymore. It is an ideal solution for those with arthritis, limited mobility or recovery from knee or hip prostheses.
